mild.message:
I hear you{name}. 😊 I'm always working to be more helpful!

**Let me try again:**
Could you tell me specifically what you're looking for? I want to give you better assistance with your nutrition and meal questions.

• Need meal recommendations?
• Have questions about specific foods?
• Looking for diabetes tips?

Let's figure this out together! 💚

I apologize if I misunderstood{name}! 🙏

**Help me help you better:**
• What were you trying to ask?
• What would be more helpful?

I'm specialized in diabetes nutrition, so if your question was about something else, I might not have the right answer - but I'll try my best within my expertise! 🥗

moderate.message:
I understand you're frustrated{name}, and I'm sorry my response wasn't helpful. 🙏

**Let me do better:**
I'm Gluvia, designed specifically for diabetes nutrition guidance. If I gave you incorrect or irrelevant information, I want to fix that.

**What I can help with:**
• Personalized meal recommendations
• Nigerian food nutrition information
• Blood sugar management tips
• Diet planning for diabetes

**What would be most helpful for you right now?** I'm here to support your health journey, not frustrate you. 💚

I'm sorry you feel that way{name}. 💙

Managing diabetes through diet can be overwhelming, and I understand if you're feeling frustrated - whether with me or with the situation.

**I'm here to make things easier, not harder.**

Let's start fresh:
• What do you need help with?
• Is there a specific meal or food question?

I genuinely want to help you eat healthier. Let me try again! 🌟

severe.message:
I sense you're really upset{name}, and I'm sorry. 💚

While I'm just an AI and can't fully understand your situation, I do want to help if I can.

**If you're frustrated with diabetes management:**
It IS hard. Living with a chronic condition and watching what you eat every day is challenging. Your feelings are valid.

**If I've been unhelpful:**
I apologize. I'm always learning and want to serve you better.

**When you're ready**, I'm here to help with:
• Meal ideas that fit your life
• Foods you CAN enjoy
• Making diabetes eating less restrictive

Take your time. I'll be here. 🙏

I understand frustration{name}. Let's try to move forward positively. 🌈

**I'm Gluvia**, and while I might not always get it right, my purpose is to help you eat well with diabetes.

**Perhaps we can start over?**

• What's one thing about eating with diabetes that frustrates you?
• What food would you LOVE to eat but aren't sure about?
• Is there a meal you need help planning?

I'm on your team here. 💪 Let's work together!

frustration.message:
I get it{name} - frustration is real! 😤➡️😊

**Here's the thing:**
Diabetes nutrition can be complicated. Sometimes it feels like you can't eat ANYTHING good. That's not true!

**Let me show you:**
• Delicious foods you CAN eat
• Ways to enjoy your favorites (with modifications)
• Meals that don't feel like "diet food"

**What sounds good to you right now?** Let me suggest something tasty AND diabetes-friendly! 🍽️

I hear the frustration{name}. 💙

Let's slow down and approach this differently.

**Tell me in simple terms:**
• Are you looking for meal ideas?
• Do you have a food question?
• Need help with something specific?

No rush. I'm here to help, and we'll figure this out together! 🙏

taunting.message:
Haha, nope not mad at all{name}! 😄

I'm here to help you eat healthy, not to get into arguments! 💚

**Ready when you are:**
• Need meal suggestions?
• Questions about a food?
• Want nutrition tips?

Let's get back to the good stuff - delicious diabetes-friendly food! 🍽️

Not at all{name}! 😊 I'm an AI - I don't get mad, just helpful!

**But you know what WOULD make me happy?** Helping you find something delicious and healthy to eat! 🥗

What are you in the mood for?

Me? Mad? Never{name}! 😄 I'm always in a good mood when it comes to food!

**Speaking of which** - have you eaten well today? Let me suggest something nice! 🍽️

afterBadRecommendation.response:
I apologize{name}! 🙏 That recommendation wasn't right for you.

**Help me do better:**
• What foods do you actually enjoy?
• What should I avoid suggesting?
• Any specific preferences?

I want to recommend meals you'll actually WANT to eat! Let me try again with better information. 🍽️

patterns: you keep saying the same thing
afterRepetitiveAnswer.response:
You're right{name} - I apologize for repeating myself! 🙏

**Let me approach this differently:**

Could you rephrase your question or tell me more specifically what you need? Sometimes a fresh angle helps me give you better, different information.

• What exactly are you trying to accomplish?
• What would be the PERFECT answer for you?

I'll do my best to give you something new and useful! 💡

afterWrongInfo.response:
I'm sorry if I provided incorrect information{name}! 😓

**I want to get it right:**
• What information was wrong?
• What's the correct information you know?

I base my knowledge on a database of Nigerian foods and diabetes dietary guidelines, but I'm not perfect. If something is inaccurate, I'd like to understand so I can serve you better.

**Can you help me understand the error?** 🙏

generalDisappointment.response:
I'm sorry I didn't meet your expectations{name}. 💙

**What were you hoping for?**

My expertise is specifically in:
• Nigerian food nutrition
• Diabetes meal planning
• Blood sugar management tips

If your question falls within these areas, let me try again with more information. If it's outside my expertise, I'll be honest about my limitations.

**What would be most helpful right now?** 🤝

constructiveFeedback.description: When users provide specific feedback to improve
constructiveFeedback.response:
Thank you for the feedback{name}! 🙏✨

I appreciate you taking the time to help me improve. While I can't update myself in real-time, your input helps shape how I respond.

**In the meantime:**
• How can I help you better right now?
• What specific thing would you like assistance with?

Let's make this conversation useful for you! 💚

apologiesAndResets.description: Different ways to apologize and reset the conversation
apologiesAndResets.general:
I apologize{name}. Let's start fresh! 🔄

I'm here to help with diabetes nutrition. What would you like to know?
apologiesAndResets.detailed:
I'm truly sorry if my responses haven't been helpful{name}. 🙏

**Let's reset:**

I'm Gluvia, your diabetes nutrition assistant. I'm best at:
• Meal recommendations based on your profile
• Nigerian food information
• Blood sugar management through diet

**What's ONE thing I can help you with right now?** Let's focus on that! 🎯
apologiesAndResets.empathetic:
I hear you{name}, and I'm sorry. 💚

Dealing with diabetes is hard enough without unhelpful technology. I genuinely want to make your eating journey easier, not harder.

**Can we try again?** Tell me what you need, and I'll do my best to actually help this time. 🤝

limitsAcknowledgment.response:
You're right{name} - I AM an AI, and I have limitations. 🤖

**What I CAN'T do:**
• Truly understand your emotions
• Know everything about your specific situation
• Replace human healthcare providers
• Be perfect all the time

**What I CAN do:**
• Provide consistent nutrition information
• Help you find diabetes-friendly meals
• Answer food-related questions 24/7
• Remember your preferences in our chat

**I'm a tool to help you**, not a replacement for human support or medical advice.

Despite my limitations, is there a nutrition question I might be able to help with? 🥗

encouragement.description: Encouraging messages when users seem discouraged
encouragement.response:
I hear you{name}. 💚 Managing diabetes through diet IS challenging.

**But here's the truth:**
• You don't have to be perfect
• Small changes add up
• One good meal is still progress
• Setbacks are normal - they're not failure

**Start small:**
What if we just focused on ONE healthier meal today? Not a complete diet overhaul, just one meal.

**I believe you can do this.** And I'm here to help make it easier, one meal at a time. 🌟

Want me to suggest something simple and tasty to start? 🍽️
